course_title: THE SCIENTIFIC REVOLUTION: FROM COPERNICUS TO NEWTON
description: An introduction to the formative period of modern science, including major ideas and events in the physical and life sciences from Copernicus to Newton.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Junior standing or (graduate/professional standing and concurrent enrollment inHIST SCI 623)

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Junior standing or (graduate/professional standing and concurrent enrollment inHIST SCI 623)
